description: Schema-backed FASM/fasmg profile sample for Visual Studio 2026 Open Folder.

hello-com.description: Build src/hello.fasm into a COM file using the active tool defaults.

restartout-com.description: Build the restartout sample into a separate COM artifact.

hello-syntax.description: Validate hello.fasm with direct fasmg execution so syntax errors surface immediately.

include-syntax.description: Validate showcase.finc through a generated wrapper source.

broken-syntax.description: Deliberately fail on the broken quote sample to validate diagnostics.

hello-output.description: Inspect the hello.com artifact produced by the active build profile.
